summary: Crystal‑clear audience recording of a legendary second set, highlighted by an unforgettable Iko > Dew transition
review: The reviewer praises this audience (AUD) tape as exceptionally clean and close—about two‑thirds board quality—and calls the second set one of the best ever performed. The Iko > Dew segue is singled out as a tear‑jerking, iconic moment, making the recording a must‑have despite only covering the second set.

ai_rating.rationale: A single detailed five‑star review rates both performance and sound very highly; with limited data confidence is low but the rating reflects an outstanding show captured in excellent audience quality.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Very clean, close mic placement, relatively high off‑crowd position; sounds about 2/3 board quality and is described as a 'sweet spot' capture.

show_quality.setlist_flow: Second set flows superbly, with the Iko > Dew transition highlighted as an emotional peak; overall described as one of the best shows ever.
